calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonai Wong #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for plaintiff Cach, LLC.
Copy of the Declaration of Edna D. Cruz was presented and reviewed in open court.

No appearance by Defendant Jeffery W. Evans.

After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:

Damages - $21059.29
Attorney's Fees - 2450.00
Prejudgment Interest - $5129.53
Costs - $470.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $29,108.82
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Re Beemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Elizabeth MacDonald (415-321-9025) special appearing for plaintiff
No appearance by defendant.

Court adopted its tentative ruling - PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Re Beemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted, sanctions awarded in the amount of $337.50. Ernst Halperin Judge Pro Tem, not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2011 Set For Trial On Apr-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
